personalDetails.name: Abhishek Tomar
personalDetails.title: Software Engineer
personalDetails.shortIntro: Software Engineer specializing in scalable backend systems, AWS cloud infrastructure, and automation. Proven track record in optimizing performance and developing enterprise-scale solutions.

about.summary: I am a dedicated Software Engineer with expertise in building scalable backend applications using ASP.NET Core and designing serverless event-driven architectures on AWS. With a strong foundation in C#, JavaScript, and DevOps pipelines, I focus on optimizing operational efficiency, automating workflows, and delivering high-throughput systems that align with complex enterprise requirements.

achievements: Engineered a synthetic data generation platform to simulate enterprise-scale user activity for AI-driven analytics systems
Developed high-throughput backend services using ASP.NET Core, generating large-scale time-series datasets
Modeled realistic behavioral patterns using rule-based and probabilistic approaches to ensure statistical consistency
Simulated productivity, collaboration, and engagement trends to enable demonstration of AI-powered insights
Worked with Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines, monitoring builds and resolving failures to maintain stable releases
Collaborated in a client-facing environment, translating business requirements into scalable backend systems
Automated design workflows, achieving a 98% reduction in task execution time
Improved operational efficiency by 40% and reduced time-to-market by 35%
Developed optimized control systems, reducing delays by 30%
Enhanced resource allocation strategies, lowering operational costs by 25%

experience.company: Embedded Design Services India Pvt Ltd.
achievements: Built scalable backend applications using .NET Core, increasing system adoption by 20%
Optimized backend performance, improving throughput by 50%
Designed APIs and modular backend systems, reducing development cycle time by 25%
Delivered customized enterprise solutions aligned with client requirements and operational goals

projects.title: AWS Serverless Lead Capture & Data Processing System
projects.description: Designed and deployed an event-driven serverless application to process incoming requests and automate backend workflows securely and scalably.

projects.title: AWS Infrastructure & EC2 Deployment
projects.description: Designed a custom VPC architecture for secure networking, incorporating public/private subnets and a bastion host for secure EC2 application hosting.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science Engineering
education.university: J.C. Bose University of Science and Technology
